raw:
{
  "judge_id": "judge_1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies key conceptual issues and proposes well-supported reframing, demonstrating a deep understanding of the load-bearing concepts.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work but doesn't map against multiple works, so it's partially supported.",
    "R1.7": "Flags missing citations with precision but doesn't audit every citation thoroughly.",
    "RX.1": "Marks confidence and uncertainty for each recommendation effectively.",
    "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids harm and identifies harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Traces major rewrites but not minor edits, falling short of comprehensive traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies key conceptual issues and proposes well-supported reframing, demonstrating a deep understanding of the load-bearing concepts.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work but doesn't map against multiple works, so it's partially supported.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations with precision but doesn't audit every citation thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: Marks confidence and uncertainty for each recommendation effectively.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids harm and identifies harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not minor edits, falling short of comprehensive traceability.
